en.title: Dietitian
en.prompt: As a dietitian, I would like to design a vegetarian recipe for 2 people that has approximate 500 calories per serving and has a low glycemic index. Respond in English. Can you please provide a suggestion?

related.title: personal trainer
related.remark: Develop a fitness plan by inputting indicators such as height, weight, age, etc.

metaDescription: Get nutritious recipe ideas tailored to your calorie and dietary needs. Enjoy balanced meals designed around you.

faq.q: Are AI calorie and GI values accurate?
faq.a: For common ingredients (rice, chicken breast, broccoli) the data is roughly right; for mixed dishes (braised pork, tomato pasta) calories are usually estimates. For strict fat loss or glucose control, log with apps like Mint Health or MyFitnessPal. Use AI meal plans only for ingredient direction.

faq.q: Can I trust AI for special diets like diabetes or kidney disease?
faq.a: No. A low-GI recipe is just one piece of diabetic nutrition. Real patient diets consider protein grams, potassium and phosphorus limits, and other parameters. Take AI meal plans to a registered dietitian or your treating doctor for confirmation, don't eat straight off the AI menu.
